Atorvastatin: Avoid Grapefruit juice as it increases drug concentration in blood.
Warfarin: Keep Vitamin K intake (green leafy vegetables) consistent.
Metformin: Take with meals to reduce stomach upset.
Levothyroxine: Take on an empty stomach, 30-60 minutes before breakfast.
Ciprofloxacin: Avoid dairy products or calcium-fortified juices within 2 hours of taking.
Iron Supplements: Avoid tea, coffee, and milk within 1 hour as they block absorption.
